cards.back: A method of requirements modeling that involves describing a specific situation or scenario to understand the functional and non-functional requirements of a system.
A UML model that describes a specific scenario of how a system is used to achieve a particular goal or set of goals.
A UML model that represents a blueprint of an object's structure, properties, and behavior in an object-oriented system.
A UML diagram that visualizes the interactions between a system and its users, showing the use cases and the objects involved.
The process of identifying, documenting, and analyzing the functional and non-functional requirements of a system.
